title: LisModpack
description: Modpack suitable for many tasks. Concentrated for Vanilla RP Survival.
body:
# The modpack is created for a comfortable game..
**I do not recommend using it on weak PCs.**
 **The modpack will be improved in the future.**
## Usage
The modpack is intended for use on the client side
It has mods for optimization and visual improvement.







<details>
